mapper.insert: insert into inventory (DeviceID, WarehouseID, Quantity, LastUpdated) VALUES (#{deviceId},#{warehouseId},#{quantity},#{dateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT i.InventoryID, i.lastUpdated, i.quantity, md.deviceName, md.modelNumber, md.category, md.manufacturer, w.location FROM inventory i JOIN medicaldevices md ON i.DeviceID = md.DeviceID JOIN warehouses w ON i.warehouseId = w.warehouseId

SELECT i.InventoryID AS InventoryID, m.DeviceName AS deviceName, m.ModelNumber AS modelNumber, m.Category AS category, m.Manufacturer AS manufacturer, i.Quantity AS quantity, w.Location AS location, i.LastUpdated AS lastUpdated FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicaldevices m ON i.DeviceID = m.DeviceID INNER JOIN warehouses w ON i.WarehouseID = w.WarehouseID
m.status = 1
AND m.DeviceName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
AND m.Category = #{category}
AND m.Manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{manufacturer}, '%')
SELECT md.DeviceName, md.ModelNumber FROM inventory i JOIN medicaldevices md ON i.DeviceID = md.DeviceID;

SELECT i.InventoryID AS InventoryID, m.DeviceName AS deviceName, m.ModelNumber AS modelNumber, m.Category AS category, m.Manufacturer AS manufacturer, i.Quantity AS quantity, w.Location AS warehouse, i.LastUpdated AS lastUpdated FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicaldevices m ON i.DeviceID = m.DeviceID INNER JOIN warehouses w ON i.WarehouseID = w.WarehouseID where InventoryID = #{inventoryID}
